image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Ever wonder why hot metal glows?
Context visual: It's all about something called blackbody radiation.
Escalation visual: As temperature rises, the color changes from red to orange to white.
Evidence visual: This happens because atoms vibrate faster, releasing energy as light.
Payoff visual: So, when you see glowing metal, it’s a dance of heat and light!
Cta visual: Curious for more science? Follow for mind-blowing facts!
